en.body:
# Executives and top management APIOps Cycles Summary

## Recommended cycles
- Capability Productization Cycle

## Key stations
- Strategy
- Architecture & Platform Decisions
- Monitoring & Improvement

## Canvases
- Capability Value Proposition Canvas
- Capability Business Model Canvas
- Business Impact Canvas

## Decisions to document
- Which reusable capabilities deserve investment?
- What business outcomes, risks, and benefits justify the work?
- Which governance evidence is needed before scaling?

## Evidence and notes

pt.title: Integration architects method summary
pt.body:
# Integration architects APIOps Cycles Summary

## Recommended cycles
- Integration Productization Cycle

## Key stations
- Estratégia de produtos API - Transforme APIs em produtos estratégicos
- Arquitetura da plataforma API - Arquitetar APIs para escalabilidade e reutilização
- Conceção da API - Conceber APIs que proporcionem valor
- Entrega da API - Fornecer APIs seguras e fiáveis

## Canvases
- Consumer Experience Requirements Canvas
- Location Canvas
- Capacity Canvas
- Event Canvas
- Interaction Canvas

## Decisions to document
- Which integration pattern fits the consumer and producer constraints?
- How are payloads, timing, ownership, and recovery handled?
- How will the capability be operated and reused?

## Evidence and notes
-
